brand_identity.name: Shared Project GPT
brand_identity.description: A production-grade tool for developers. No fluff. Just signal.

heading.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Modal titles

code.usage: Code snippets, API keys, System Prompts, IDs

rules: Overlines/Labels must be wide: tracking-widest uppercase text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground
Body text should be relaxed: leading-relaxed
Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for body text. Use #E4E4E7 (Zinc-200) for readability.

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.

containers.main: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8
containers.auth: min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-background relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all

cards.base: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

sidebar.base: w-64 border-r border-border bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-xl h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 z-40 hidden md:block
sidebar.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

gradients.hero_glow: absolute top-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[1000px] h-[500px] bg-indigo-500/20 blur-[120px] rounded-full pointer-events-none

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid var(--border). Use 'divide-y divide-border' for lists.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Stroke width 1.5px for elegance.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is at least Zinc-400 on Zinc-950. Avoid dark blue on black.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Force dark mode in 'tailwind.config.js' and 'index.css'. Do not create a light mode toggle.
3. LAYOUT: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component that includes the Sidebar and a Topbar. Wrap all protected routes in this.
4. AUTH: The login page should be split 50/50. Left side: Form. Right side: The 'auth_background' image with a glass overlay and a quote.
5. CHAT: The chat interface is the core. It must feel fast. Use 'optimistic UI' updates if possible (show message immediately before server confirms).
6. ADMIN: The Admin Config page should look like a 'Settings' panel. Use tabs for 'Model Config' and 'System Prompt'.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to every button, input, and link. Format: 'page-section-element'. Example: 'login-form-email-input'.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients, no centered text blocks unless it's a hero title.
Dark Mode Mastery: Use shades of Zinc (neutral gray) for the UI. Do not use pure black for cards.
Borders: Use 1px borders to define structure. Dark mode relies on borders more than shadows.
Feedback: Every action needs a toast notification. Use 'sonner'.
Empty States: Never leave a list empty. Show a helpful 'Create your first project' card with an icon.
